data.title: WLFI blacklisted 272 addresses within a week
data.description: Galaxy researcher Zack wrote that WLFI has blacklisted 272 addresses in the past week, and on-chain data shows that some of them were batch operations.

data.title: President Trump Slams Fed Chair Powell: Here’s Why Weak Jobs Data Could Force a Major Rate Cut
data.description:
President Trump has expressed strong criticism of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, arguing that the recent disappointing jobs data could necessitate a significant reduction in interest rates. In his remarks, he emphasized that the sluggish job growth could create economic headwinds, prompting the Fed to take decisive action to stimulate the economy by lowering rates. This potential rate cut, he suggests, might be instrumental in addressing the underlying issues affecting employment and overall economic performance.
source: https://blocknews.com/president-trump-slams-fed-chair-powell-heres-why-weak-jobs-data-could-force-a-major-rate-cut/

data.title: NEAR One CEO X's account was hacked, and the team reminds users to beware of scams.
data.description: NEAR Protocol officials announced that the account X belonging to NEAR One CEO @BowenWang 18 was compromised and used to post false information claiming to be giving away $1 million worth of NEAR. Users are advised not to interact with or forward this content. The team is currently working to restore the account and will provide further updates once full control is restored.

data.title: Whales lost $10.67 million due to chasing long ETH due to non-farm payroll data, with cumulative losses exceeding $35.8 million in one month.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ember (@EmberCN), a whale who had previously sold HYPE and switched to a long position in ETH increased their long position in ETH at $4,446 following the release of the non-farm payroll data at 8:30 AM. However, ETH subsequently fell rapidly, and the whale closed their entire 52,800 ETH position at approximately $4,265, incurring a loss of approximately $10.67 million. Since July 25th, the whale has continued to hold long ETH and frequently stopped out, resulting in cumulative losses of $35.84 million.

data.title: Network Tokens Are Infrastructure, Not Securities, Wintermute Tells SEC

data.title: Galaxy Researcher Highlights WLFI's Recent Blacklisting Activity
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Galaxy researcher Zack shared on social media that WLFI has blacklisted 272 addresses over the past week. On-chain records indicate that some of these actions were part of a bulk blacklisting operation.

data.title: A whale sold 10,000 ETH through Wintermute, making a profit of $960,000
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ember (@EmberCN), a whale/institution sold 10,000 ETH at $4,431 via Wintermute in the past hour, acquiring 44.31 million USDC. This ETH was originally purchased at $4,335 on August 26th, resulting in a profit of approximately $960,000, bringing the cumulative ETH swing profit to $73.96 million.
